_meta.source: ITU-R Handbook on Small Satellites, 2023 Edition, Chapter 3

condition_labels.9.2B -> 9.1: for networks not subject to coordination under Section II
condition_labels.9.1 -> 9.3: after publication of API/A special section
condition_labels.9.3 -> 9.4: if unacceptable interference may be caused
condition_labels.9.3 -> 9.5: upon consolidation of comments at end of four-month period
condition_labels.9.30 -> 9.1A: upon receipt of complete CR information
condition_labels.9.35 -> 9.36: to identify administrations with which coordination is to be effected
condition_labels.9.36 -> 11.2: when proceeding to notification after coordination
condition_labels.11.2 -> 11.15: DBIU date declared in Appendix 4 data submission
condition_labels.11.15 -> 11.25: DBIU must be within 3 years of notification receipt date
condition_labels.11.31 -> 11.32: coordination procedure conformity check (if coordination required)
condition_labels.4.4 -> 11.2: notification obligation still applies under No. 4.4
condition_labels.4.4 -> 8.5: immediate elimination of harmful interference upon notification
condition_labels.4.2 -> 4.4: only if use will not cause harmful interference
condition_labels.11.41 -> 11.42A: if harmful interference occurs, cancellation possible
condition_labels.11.31 -> 11.44: after Master Register recording (Part II-S), proceed to BIU
condition_labels.11.44 -> 11.47: BIU confirmation to BR, provisional recording becomes final
condition_labels.11.44 -> 11.44C: for non-GSO in FSS/MSS/BSS: 90-day continuous operation required

9.1.note: API submission triggers as-received publication within ~1 week, then API/A special section within 2 months.

9.2B.note: Applies to networks NOT subject to coordination under Section II of Article 9. This is the primary route for most small satellite missions.

9.3.note: 4-month comment window. No comment = no objection deemed. BR consolidates and publishes API/B.

9.4.note: Both administrations must cooperate. Administration with planned network must explore all means without requiring others to adjust. BR assistance available on request.

9.30.note: Coordination Request (CR) submission. Required for networks subject to coordination under Section II of Article 9.

9.1A.note: API/C special section is auto-generated from the CR submission. Published within 2 months of receipt.

9.35.note: BR examines CR and identifies affected administrations. Results published in CR/C special section within 4 months.

9.36.note: Identifies administrations with which coordination is to be effected. Coordination period begins.

11.2.note: Notification of frequency assignments for recording in the MIFR. Must include DBIU (planned BIU date) via Appendix 4 data item (No. 11.15). DBIU must be within 3 years of notification receipt date (No. 11.25).

11.15.note: Date of Bringing Into Use (DBIU) — declared in the Appendix 4 submission at notification stage. This is the planned date, not the actual BIU. Constraint: DBIU must be within 3 years of notification receipt (No. 11.25).

11.25.note: Notification shall not be sent earlier than 3 years before the planned date of bringing into use (DBIU). This constrains the timing window for notification submission.

11.28.note: Part I-S = acknowledgement of receipt. Part II-S = recorded in Master Register (favourable finding). Part III-S = returned to administration (unfavourable finding).

11.31.note: Regulatory examination applied to all notifications and CRs. Checks compliance with Article 5, Article 21, Article 22, and coordination requirements.

11.32.note: Coordination procedure conformity check. Only applies when coordination under Section II of Article 9 is required.

11.41.note: Assignment can be recorded with indication of administrations whose coordination has not been completed. If harmful interference occurs, the responsible administration must immediately eliminate it.

11.44.note: Bring Into Use (BIU) — the actual act of launching and operating the satellite. Occurs AFTER Master Register recording (Part II-S). Must be within the 7-year clock from API/A receipt (non-coordination) or API/C receipt (coordination). BIU confirmation is then sent to BR via No. 11.47.

11.47.note: BIU confirmation to the Bureau. Provisional recording becomes final. Must be confirmed within 30 days after the end of the 7-year regulatory period.

11.32A.note: Harmful interference probability assessment. Applied when the Bureau needs to evaluate whether an assignment would cause harmful interference to existing or planned assignments.

8.5.note: Any administration which has knowledge that a station under its jurisdiction is causing harmful interference shall immediately eliminate that interference.

4.4.note: Administration must determine before BIU: (a) no harmful interference to conforming stations, (b) measures to immediately eliminate interference per No. 8.5. Notification required with these confirmations.

non_coordination.name: 非調整フロー (Non-coordination)
non_coordination.description: 調整対象外ネットワークの手続き: API → コメント → 通告 → 審査 → 記録 → BIU

BIU — 衛星打上げ・使用開始
